data.description: The euro gains versus the dollar as disappointing U.S. labor data increases the likelihood of a Fed rate cut to 90%.

data.title: General Dynamics NASSCO, DSEC Co., and Samsung Heavy Industries Co. signed a tri-party agreement. Dec 3, 2025.
data.description: A memorandum was signed today by General Dynamics NASSCO, a division of General Dynamics publicly traded under NYSE as GD, along with DSEC Co., Ltd., and Samsung Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. of South Korea. This strategic alliance marks a significant partnership in the industry. The details of the memorandum were not disclosed.

data.title: Kenall's MedMaster Saturn™ recognized on BD+C's 75 Top Building Products List for 2025 for innovative lighting design.
data.description: In Kenosha, Wisconsin, on December 3, 2025, Kenall's MedMaster Saturn™ luminaire was recognized as one of Building Design + Construction's top 75 building products for 2025. This luminaire is setting a new standard in lighting design for behavioral health and healthcare settings. The recognition highlights the innovative approach taken by Kenall in developing this product.

data.title: Kenall Manufacturing's MedMaster Saturn luminaire wins 2025 Product Innovation Awards by i+s and Architectural Products.
data.description: Kenall Manufacturing from Kenosha, Wisconsin, received recognition for design excellence with their new MedMaster Saturn™ luminaire. Both Interiors + Sources and Architectural Products awarded the 2025 Product Innovation Awards (PIAs) to this luminaire. The esteemed awards were granted for its innovative design and functionality.

APAC insurance sector outlook remains neutral, according to Fitch Ratings, supported by steady performance.

data.title: MasterControl awarded 2026 Buyer's Choice Awards for best capabilities, value, and customer relationship. From SALT LAKE CITY, Dec. 3, 2025.
data.description: MasterControl has been acknowledged by its clients for its top-tier capabilities, value for price, and customer relationship. The company, headquartered in Salt Lake City, has gained recognition in these aspects from various stakeholders. MasterControl specializes in providing quality, manufacturing, and asset management software tailored for regulated industries. This recognition underscores the exceptional quality and value that their products and services offer. The feedback from customers exemplifies the company's commitment to excellence, with a focus on meeting client needs effectively.
China’s central bank fixed the yuan reference rate at 7.0733 against the U.S. dollar, up from 7.0640 at the last close.
Trump’s tariffs are raising concerns among U.S. producers about potential restrictions on trade with Canada and Mexico.

data.title: Hapbee appoints Hasan Shahid to Board to strengthen capital markets & growth capabilities; seasoned technologist & investor.
data.description: A skilled individual specializing in technology, investments, and capital markets has recently been appointed to the Board of Directors at Hapbee. This prominent addition brings valuable expertise and experience to the company's leadership team. The new board member is expected to make significant contributions to Hapbee's strategic decisions and overall growth trajectory. This development is anticipated to have a positive impact on Hapbee's operations and potentially attract more investors.
